creator: peter.schuller@infidyne.com
text:
Thanks,

The upstream tarball fails to fetch for me:

  => Attempting to fetch from http://download.github.com/.
  fetch: http://download.github.com/jochu-clojure-mode-ed0bb13.tar.gz: Not Found

I haven't investigated what the problem is or what the stable
permanent URL is supposed to be if it's wrong (no time right now, but
will look at it if I don't hear anything).

-- 
/ Peter Schuller
